# 🌅 Morning Digest — Monday, June 1, 2026

## 📬 Emails Needing Attention

⚠️ **Microsoft 365 connector is currently disconnected.** Email data could not be retrieved. Please reconnect the Microsoft connector in Cowork settings.

## 💬 Teams — Active Conversations

## 📅 Today's Agenda

⚠️ **Microsoft 365 connector is currently disconnected.** Calendar data could not be retrieved.

## ⚡ Immediate Action

🔴 **Action required:** The Microsoft 365 connector has been invalidated and needs to be reconnected. Until then, email, Teams, and calendar data will not appear in your morning digest. Please reconnect in Cowork → Settings → Connectors.
